docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ENRIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL DAB PACIFIC CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
DECLARATION RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $8,765.84 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ENRIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL DAB PACIFIC CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ENRIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL DAB PACIFIC CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION $8,546.44 PRINCIPAL, $33.83 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,780.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ENRIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL DAB PACIFIC CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION $17,576.11 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,576.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, JOSE SERVED MAY-17-2019, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ENRIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL DAB PACIFIC CONCRETE CONSTRUCTION PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON JUN-24-2019 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
